post.description: Changes current user password and revokes current token.
Authenticates a user and returns JWT token.
Creates a new user account and returns JWT token.

get.description: Returns manga list with optional filters.

put.description: Updates an existing manga by ID.

get.description: Returns online users grouped by room.
Returns recent chat messages for a room.
Returns users currently connected to the target room.
Returns current user's library and grouped reading lists.

post.description: Adds or upserts a manga library entry for the authenticated user.

put.description: Updates status/rating for a manga in authenticated user's library.

delete.description: Removes manga from the authenticated user's library.

post.description: Sends a private message to another user.

put.description: Updates chapter/volume progress for a manga in user's library.

get.description: Returns progress update history for the authenticated user.
